text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 418 

SPECIALTY_TIER 

LABEL: Specialty Tier Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates which, if any, of the formulary tiers is designated as the specialty tier. The 
specialty tier contains high-cost products which must meet a certain monthly dollar threshold as set by 
CMS, and products on this tier are typically limited to a percentage coinsurance of 25% and cannot 
exceed 33%.
